trans-unit.source: Bitcoin market intelligence for cycle-aware decisions
trans-unit.target: Bitcoin market intelligence for cycle-aware decisions

trans-unit.source: Track on-chain valuation, cycle signals, and model context in one focused workspace.
trans-unit.target: Track on-chain valuation, cycle signals, and model context in one focused workspace.

trans-unit.source: Valuation stretch is below overheated territory.
trans-unit.target: Valuation stretch is below overheated territory.

trans-unit.source: Price sits in the accumulation-to-fair-value band.
trans-unit.target: Price sits in the accumulation-to-fair-value band.

trans-unit.source: Moving averages have not produced a top signal.
trans-unit.target: Moving averages have not produced a top signal.

trans-unit.source: Administrative user list API access is role protected.
trans-unit.target: Administrative user list API access is role protected.

trans-unit.source: Preferences saved locally. Account sync will be enabled next.
trans-unit.target: Preferences saved locally. Account sync will be enabled next.

trans-unit.source: Choose a trading horizon, preferred language, and alert sensitivity after registration.
trans-unit.target: Choose a trading horizon, preferred language, and alert sensitivity after registration.

trans-unit.source: Onboarding dismissed. Account completion tracking will be enabled next.
trans-unit.target: Onboarding dismissed. Account completion tracking will be enabled next.

trans-unit.source: Professional Bitcoin analysis tools, free forever
trans-unit.target: Professional Bitcoin analysis tools, free forever

trans-unit.source: Follow cycle signals, valuation models, and on-chain context from a focused workspace built for long-term market decisions.
trans-unit.target: Follow cycle signals, valuation models, and on-chain context from a focused workspace built for long-term market decisions.

trans-unit.source: Keep the indicators you care about closest
trans-unit.target: Keep the indicators you care about closest

trans-unit.source: Start with curated KPI widgets, then shape your workspace around valuation, momentum, alerts, and research workflows.
trans-unit.target: Start with curated KPI widgets, then shape your workspace around valuation, momentum, alerts, and research workflows.

trans-unit.source: Turn Bitcoin models into daily operating signals
trans-unit.target: Turn Bitcoin models into daily operating signals

trans-unit.source: Open historical charts, compare timeframes, and prepare alerts so important threshold changes do not slip past you.
trans-unit.target: Open historical charts, compare timeframes, and prepare alerts so important threshold changes do not slip past you.

trans-unit.source: Login successful. Complete the quick orientation to continue.
trans-unit.target: Login successful. Complete the quick orientation to continue.

trans-unit.source: Reset link is invalid or expired
trans-unit.target: Reset link is invalid or expired

trans-unit.source: The request could not be completed. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: The request could not be completed. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Search questions and answers about every feature of the platform.
trans-unit.target: Search questions and answers about every feature of the platform.

trans-unit.source: No answers found for your search.
trans-unit.target: No answers found for your search.

trans-unit.source: BitWLab is a free Bitcoin on-chain analytics platform. It brings together over 20 valuation models, cycle indicators, and macro context charts in one focused workspace — no subscriptions or paid data feeds required.
trans-unit.target: BitWLab is a free Bitcoin on-chain analytics platform. It brings together over 20 valuation models, cycle indicators, and macro context charts in one focused workspace — no subscriptions or paid data feeds required.

trans-unit.source: Yes, completely. All charts, models, alerts, and tools are free with no premium tiers or paywalls. The platform relies entirely on publicly available data sources.
trans-unit.target: Yes, completely. All charts, models, alerts, and tools are free with no premium tiers or paywalls. The platform relies entirely on publicly available data sources.

trans-unit.source: Do I need an account to use BitWLab?
trans-unit.target: Do I need an account to use BitWLab?

trans-unit.source: Yes. A free account is required to access live charts and features. Registration only needs your email address — no credit card or personal data beyond that.
trans-unit.target: Yes. A free account is required to access live charts and features. Registration only needs your email address — no credit card or personal data beyond that.

trans-unit.source: The platform supports English and Hungarian. Switch at any time using the EN / HU toggle in the top navigation bar, or permanently from My Account in the user menu.
trans-unit.target: The platform supports English and Hungarian. Switch at any time using the EN / HU toggle in the top navigation bar, or permanently from My Account in the user menu.

trans-unit.source: The Dashboard is your personal overview screen. It shows customisable metric widgets for key Bitcoin indicators, a market signals banner with a composite cycle score, and quick access to your favourite and recently viewed charts.
trans-unit.target: The Dashboard is your personal overview screen. It shows customisable metric widgets for key Bitcoin indicators, a market signals banner with a composite cycle score, and quick access to your favourite and recently viewed charts.

trans-unit.source: Widgets are metric cards arranged in a grid on your Dashboard. Each widget shows a key value — such as MVRV Z-Score, BTC 24-hour change, Stock-to-Flow, Halving progress, or Fear & Greed index — updated automatically.
trans-unit.target: Widgets are metric cards arranged in a grid on your Dashboard. Each widget shows a key value — such as MVRV Z-Score, BTC 24-hour change, Stock-to-Flow, Halving progress, or Fear & Greed index — updated automatically.

trans-unit.source: How do I add or remove a widget?
trans-unit.target: How do I add or remove a widget?

trans-unit.source: Click "Add Widget" at the top of the Dashboard to browse available metrics and add them to your grid. To remove a widget, hover over it and click the ✕ button that appears in the corner. Drag widgets to reorder them.
trans-unit.target: Click "Add Widget" at the top of the Dashboard to browse available metrics and add them to your grid. To remove a widget, hover over it and click the ✕ button that appears in the corner. Drag widgets to reorder them.

trans-unit.source: What is the Market Signals Banner?
trans-unit.target: What is the Market Signals Banner?

trans-unit.source: The banner at the top of the Dashboard shows a composite cycle score (−100 to +100), the current BTC price, an overall zone label (Very Bullish to Very Bearish), and individual readings for each tracked indicator. Clicking it opens the Trade Planner.
trans-unit.target: The banner at the top of the Dashboard shows a composite cycle score (−100 to +100), the current BTC price, an overall zone label (Very Bullish to Very Bearish), and individual readings for each tracked indicator. Clicking it opens the Trade Planner.

trans-unit.source: Over 20 analytical models are available: MVRV Z-Score, Rainbow Band, Pi Cycle Top, Stock-to-Flow, Fear & Greed, Puell Multiple, Power Law, CVDD, Halving Spiral, Realized Price, 200-Day MA, 2-Year MA Multiplier, Hash Ribbons, VDD Multiple, Mayer Multiple, Difficulty Ribbon, 200-Week MA Heatmap, NVT Ratio, Thermocap Multiple, Excess Liquidity, and S&P 500 Liquidity.
trans-unit.target: Over 20 analytical models are available: MVRV Z-Score, Rainbow Band, Pi Cycle Top, Stock-to-Flow, Fear & Greed, Puell Multiple, Power Law, CVDD, Halving Spiral, Realized Price, 200-Day MA, 2-Year MA Multiplier, Hash Ribbons, VDD Multiple, Mayer Multiple, Difficulty Ribbon, 200-Week MA Heatmap, NVT Ratio, Thermocap Multiple, Excess Liquidity, and S&P 500 Liquidity.

trans-unit.source: How do I browse the chart library?
trans-unit.target: How do I browse the chart library?

trans-unit.source: Click "Charts" in the top navigation bar to open the Chart Library. Charts are grouped by category and searchable by name. Click any chart card to open the full interactive chart page.
trans-unit.target: Click "Charts" in the top navigation bar to open the Chart Library. Charts are grouped by category and searchable by name. Click any chart card to open the full interactive chart page.

trans-unit.source: Yes. On any chart page use the export menu in the toolbar to download the chart as a PNG image or CSV data file. The export captures all visible data and annotations.
trans-unit.target: Yes. On any chart page use the export menu in the toolbar to download the chart as a PNG image or CSV data file. The export captures all visible data and annotations.

trans-unit.source: Annotations let you place personal notes on a chart at specific dates. Click the annotation tool in the chart toolbar, then click the chart at the date you want to mark. Your notes are saved to your account and persist across sessions.
trans-unit.target: Annotations let you place personal notes on a chart at specific dates. Click the annotation tool in the chart toolbar, then click the chart at the date you want to mark. Your notes are saved to your account and persist across sessions.

trans-unit.source: How do I save a chart to my favourites?
trans-unit.target: How do I save a chart to my favourites?

trans-unit.source: Click the star (★) icon on any chart page to add it to your favourites. Starred charts appear in the Favourites tab on your Dashboard for quick access. Click the star again to remove it.
trans-unit.target: Click the star (★) icon on any chart page to add it to your favourites. Starred charts appear in the Favourites tab on your Dashboard for quick access. Click the star again to remove it.

trans-unit.source: The Trade Planner is a decision-support tool that aggregates multiple on-chain cycle signals into a composite score. It shows a signal grid, price projections based on historical cycle data, and a personal trade plan log where you can record entries, targets, and notes.
trans-unit.target: The Trade Planner is a decision-support tool that aggregates multiple on-chain cycle signals into a composite score. It shows a signal grid, price projections based on historical cycle data, and a personal trade plan log where you can record entries, targets, and notes.

trans-unit.source: How is the market signal score calculated?
trans-unit.target: How is the market signal score calculated?

trans-unit.source: The composite score (−100 to +100) aggregates readings from MVRV Z-Score, Rainbow Band, Fear & Greed, Stock-to-Flow, Puell Multiple, and other indicators. Each contributes a normalised sub-score based on its current zone. Higher positive scores indicate bullish cycle conditions; lower negative scores indicate bearish conditions.
trans-unit.target: The composite score (−100 to +100) aggregates readings from MVRV Z-Score, Rainbow Band, Fear & Greed, Stock-to-Flow, Puell Multiple, and other indicators. Each contributes a normalised sub-score based on its current zone. Higher positive scores indicate bullish cycle conditions; lower negative scores indicate bearish conditions.

trans-unit.source: Alerts are email notifications triggered when a chosen indicator crosses a threshold you set. For example, get notified when the MVRV Z-Score exceeds 7, or when the Fear & Greed index drops below 20.
trans-unit.target: Alerts are email notifications triggered when a chosen indicator crosses a threshold you set. For example, get notified when the MVRV Z-Score exceeds 7, or when the Fear & Greed index drops below 20.

trans-unit.source: How do I create an alert?
trans-unit.target: How do I create an alert?

trans-unit.source: Go to the Alerts page from the top navigation, click "Create alert", select an indicator and metric, set a threshold direction (above or below) and value, then save. You will receive an email when the condition is met. Alerts can be paused, edited, or deleted at any time.
trans-unit.target: Go to the Alerts page from the top navigation, click "Create alert", select an indicator and metric, set a threshold direction (above or below) and value, then save. You will receive an email when the condition is met. Alerts can be paused, edited, or deleted at any time.

trans-unit.source: How do I change the interface language?
trans-unit.target: How do I change the interface language?

trans-unit.source: Click EN or HU in the top navigation bar to switch between English and Hungarian. To save your preference permanently, open My Account from the user menu, select a language, and click Save changes.
trans-unit.target: Click EN or HU in the top navigation bar to switch between English and Hungarian. To save your preference permanently, open My Account from the user menu, select a language, and click Save changes.

trans-unit.source: How do I update my name or preferences?
trans-unit.target: How do I update my name or preferences?

trans-unit.source: Click your avatar (initials button) in the top-right corner and select "My Account". Update your full name and language preference, then click "Save changes" to apply.
trans-unit.target: Click your avatar (initials button) in the top-right corner and select "My Account". Update your full name and language preference, then click "Save changes" to apply.

trans-unit.source: What data does BitWLab collect about me?
trans-unit.target: What data does BitWLab collect about me?

trans-unit.source: Only your email address and optionally your full name are stored. Standard server logs (IP address, browser type) are kept for security. No payment data is collected and no third-party tracking cookies are used. See Privacy Policy in the user menu for full details.
trans-unit.target: Only your email address and optionally your full name are stored. Standard server logs (IP address, browser type) are kept for security. No payment data is collected and no third-party tracking cookies are used. See Privacy Policy in the user menu for full details.

trans-unit.source: A focused research workspace for Bitcoin valuation models, cycle signals, and long-term market context. Create an account to open the live charts.
trans-unit.target: A focused research workspace for Bitcoin valuation models, cycle signals, and long-term market context. Create an account to open the live charts.

trans-unit.source: Professional Bitcoin market tools after login
trans-unit.target: Professional Bitcoin market tools after login

trans-unit.source: Long-term logarithmic valuation bands for market-cycle context.
trans-unit.target: Long-term logarithmic valuation bands for market-cycle context.

trans-unit.source: Moving-average crossover signals designed for cycle-top awareness.
trans-unit.target: Moving-average crossover signals designed for cycle-top awareness.

trans-unit.source: Scarcity model tracking with halving context and divergence views.
trans-unit.target: Scarcity model tracking with halving context and divergence views.

trans-unit.source: Charts, annotations, exports, and admin tools require an account.
trans-unit.target: Charts, annotations, exports, and admin tools require an account.

trans-unit.source: No charts viewed yet. Explore the chart library to get started!
trans-unit.target: No charts viewed yet. Explore the chart library to get started!

trans-unit.source: Automatically backfills all Bitcoin price history from 2013 (earliest exchange data) to today, one year at a time.
trans-unit.target: Automatically backfills all Bitcoin price history from 2013 (earliest exchange data) to today, one year at a time.

trans-unit.source: Combine Bitcoin metrics with arithmetic operators to create your own KPI widget.
trans-unit.target: Combine Bitcoin metrics with arithmetic operators to create your own KPI widget.

trans-unit.target: The widget could not be added. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: The widget could not be saved. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: The widget could not be saved. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Cumulative Value Coin Days Destroyed — a historically accurate bottom indicator
trans-unit.target: Cumulative Value Coin Days Destroyed — a historically accurate bottom indicator

trans-unit.source: No CVDD chart data is available yet.
trans-unit.target: No CVDD chart data is available yet.

trans-unit.source: Long-term price model based on power law regression since Bitcoin genesis
trans-unit.target: Long-term price model based on power law regression since Bitcoin genesis

trans-unit.source: Logarithmic growth curve with color-coded valuation bands
trans-unit.target: Logarithmic growth curve with color-coded valuation bands

trans-unit.target: Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Interactive chart rendering starts in the next chart visualization story.
trans-unit.target: Interactive chart rendering starts in the next chart visualization story.

trans-unit.source: Market value vs realized value to identify statistically extreme cycle positions
trans-unit.target: Market value vs realized value to identify statistically extreme cycle positions

trans-unit.target: Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Moving-average crossover signal for potential Bitcoin cycle tops
trans-unit.target: Moving-average crossover signal for potential Bitcoin cycle tops

trans-unit.target: Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: Daily miner revenue relative to its 365-day average to identify miner stress and euphoria
trans-unit.target: Daily miner revenue relative to its 365-day average to identify miner stress and euphoria

trans-unit.target: Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.

trans-unit.target: Scarcity-driven model price compared with Bitcoin market price
